title: coelogyne oreophila
intro: Coelogyne oreophila, also known as the Himalayan Coelogyne, is a species of orchid that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne oreophila include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne oreophila is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
